problems.title: 1-D Array Creation
problems.description: Create a 1-D array with elements [1, 2, 3], and display its dtype and ndim. Expected output: dtype: int32, ndim: 1. Use main() to produce the expected result shown in the example.
problems.prompt: Create a 1-D array with elements [1, 2, 3], and display its dtype and ndim. Expected output: dtype: int32, ndim: 1
problems.starter_code:
from numpy import *

def main(arr):
    # Write your solution here.
    pass

if __name__ == "__main__":
    arr = array([1, 2, 3])
    main(arr)
problems.solution:
from numpy import *

def main(arr):
    print(arr.dtype)
    print(arr.ndim)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    arr = array([1, 2, 3])
    main(arr)

problems.title: Array Reshaping 1-D to 2-D
problems.description: Reshape the 1-D array [1, 2, 3, 4] to a 2-D array of shape (2, 2). Expected output: [[1 2] [3 4]]. Use main() to produce the expected result shown in the example.
problems.prompt: Reshape the 1-D array [1, 2, 3, 4] to a 2-D array of shape (2, 2). Expected output: [[1 2] [3 4]]
problems.starter_code:
from numpy import *

def main(input_1, input_2, input_3):
    # Write your solution here.
    pass

if __name__ == "__main__":
    input_1 = [1, 2, 3, 4]

    input_2 = 2

    input_3 = 2
    main(input_1, input_2, input_3)
problems.solution:
from numpy import *

def main(input_1, input_2, input_3):
    arr_reshape = array(input_1).reshape(input_2, input_3)
    print(arr_reshape)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    input_1 = [1, 2, 3, 4]

    input_2 = 2

    input_3 = 2
    main(input_1, input_2, input_3)

    print(arr3d)

    input_2 = 2

problems.title: Matrix Diagonal

problems.starter_code:
from numpy import *

def main(matrix_diag):
    # Write your solution here.
    pass

if __name__ == "__main__":
    matrix_diag = matrix('1 2; 3 4')
    main(matrix_diag)
problems.solution:
from numpy import *

def main(matrix_diag):
    matrix_diag.diagonal()
    print(matrix_diag.diagonal())

if __name__ == "__main__":
    matrix_diag = matrix('1 2; 3 4')
    main(matrix_diag)

from numpy import *

def main(input_1):
    mat = matrix(input_1)
    print(mat)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    input_1 = '1 2 3 6 ; 4 5 6 7'
    main(input_1)
